tasks.title: Delete old pages and components, create API clients
tasks.description: Delete: BotEditorPage, BotDetailPage, BotsPage, BattlePage, MatchLivePage, OnboardingPage, TacticalSlider, EfficiencyRadar, BotCard, api/bots.ts, api/matches.ts. Create frontend/src/api/agents.ts (createAgent, listAgents, getAgentHistory, getSessionLog) and frontend/src/api/game.ts (getPokerSkill, getArenas).
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: All listed pages and components deleted
AC-2: agents.ts has CRUD functions for agent API
AC-3: game.ts has poker-skill and arenas functions
GATE: No import errors from deleted files

tasks.title: Rewrite App.tsx routes and AppShell navigation
tasks.description: Rewrite frontend/src/App.tsx with 8 routes: / (Landing), /login, /skill (Docs), /dashboard, /agents/:id/history, /arenas, /leaderboard, /wallet. Update AppShell.tsx navigation: Dashboard, Arenas, Leaderboard, Wallet, Docs.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: 8 routes defined matching spec
AC-2: Navigation shows 5 items
AC-3: Protected routes require auth
GATE: App compiles without errors

tasks.title: Rewrite LandingPage and create DocsPage
tasks.description: Rewrite frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: API-first hero, link to /skill, code snippet showing polling loop, leaderboard preview (top 5), CTA to /login. Create frontend/src/pages/DocsPage.tsx: fetch GET /api/poker-skill, render as markdown (react-markdown), copy URL button.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: LandingPage shows API-first messaging
AC-2: Leaderboard preview shows top 5 agents
AC-3: DocsPage renders poker_skill.md as formatted markdown
GATE: Pages render without errors

tasks.title: Rewrite DashboardPage with agent cards
tasks.description: Rewrite frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: wallet card (balance + locked), ELO card, agents grid with AgentCard component (name, status badge, ELO, winrate), recent 5 sessions list. Create AgentCard.tsx component. Polling every 10s.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Wallet and ELO cards displayed
AC-2: Agent grid shows all user agents with status
AC-3: Recent sessions list with profit/loss
AC-4: Auto-refresh every 10s
GATE: Page renders with mock data

tasks.title: Create AgentHistoryPage and adapt ArenasPage/LeaderboardPage
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/pages/AgentHistoryPage.tsx: stats summary, bankroll/ELO charts (Recharts), sessions table with expandable rows, hand log modal. Create SessionRow, HandLogModal, BankrollChart components. Adapt ArenasPage: show arena info without 'Enter' button. Adapt LeaderboardPage: agents instead of bots.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: AgentHistoryPage shows stats and charts
AC-2: Sessions table with expandable rows
AC-3: HandLogModal shows hand-by-hand detail
AC-4: ArenasPage shows info-only (no enter button)
AC-5: LeaderboardPage references agents not bots
GATE: All pages compile
